et.homeHeroTitle: Kiired ariveebid, mis mojuvad tosiselt ja toovad rohkem paringuid.
et.homeHeroDescription: Ehitan veebilehti kohalikele ettevotetele, kes vajavad rohkem usaldust, selgemat sonumit ja tugevamat teed paringuteni.
et.ctaTitle: Iga nadal, mil viivitad, lahkub sinu veebilt rohkem ostjaid ja maksab kellelegi teisele.
et.ctaDescription: Kusi tasuta veebiauditit ja vaata, kus sinu praegune leht mojub norgalt, aeglaselt voi ebaselgelt.
et.footerTitle: Kiired ja veenvad veebilehed ettevotetele, kes ei saa endale lubada aeglast voi aegunud kuvandit.
et.footerText: Loodud kohalikele ettevotetele, kes vajavad paremat esmamuljet, rohkem usaldust ja rohkem paringuid.

successMessage.en: Thanks. Your message was sent and I will reply as soon as possible.
successMessage.et: Aitah. Sinu sonum on saadetud ja vastan esimesel voimalusel.

posts.title: How much does a small business website cost in Estonia?
posts.excerpt: The real answer depends on scope, copy, SEO depth, and whether the site is built to sell or just exist.
posts.description: A practical breakdown of what drives small business website pricing in Estonia.

sections.heading: Most websites are priced by complexity.
body: A simple local business site costs far less than a site with multiple service pages, stronger messaging work, and deeper SEO structure.

posts.title: Why local business websites lose leads even when traffic is fine
posts.excerpt: Traffic alone does not help when trust signals, structure, and calls to action are weak.
posts.description: The most common reasons local business websites lose enquiries despite getting visitors.

sections.heading: The problem is often trust, not traffic.
body: Visitors still leave when the business looks outdated, unclear, or hard to contact.

servicePages.title: Website Development
servicePages.summary: Fast business websites built to look credible, load quickly, and make action obvious.
servicePages.intro: This is for businesses that need a serious online presence instead of another generic brochure site.
servicePages.pain: Your current website loads slowly, looks outdated, and leaks potential customers every day.

bestFor: Local businesses launching a new website
Businesses with slow or outdated websites
